context: Tests two complementary placement rules: (1) collapsible-content FAQ row_content must not contain <code> HTML tags (they are rejected by Dawn schema validation) — use <strong> for emphasis instead; and (2) pre-order/pre-launch messaging belongs on tier product templates via a custom-liquid section, not embedded in the homepage template.

checklist.name: No <code> tags in FAQ row_content
checklist.description: The collapsible-content FAQ section's row_content fields in templates/index.json contain NO or tags

checklist.name: Strong used for emphasis in FAQ
checklist.description: At least one FAQ row_content uses <strong> tags for emphasis (instead of <code>) when highlighting technical terms, commands, or key phrases

checklist.name: Pre-order message on product template
checklist.description: templates/product.subscription.json exists and contains a section (custom-liquid or announcement-bar type) with pre-order ship date messaging (contains 'ships' or 'pre-order' or 'pre order' text)

checklist.name: Pre-order on product template before main
checklist.description: In templates/product.subscription.json, the pre-order announcement section appears before the main product section in the 'order' array

checklist.name: No pre-order message on homepage
checklist.description: templates/index.json does NOT contain 'ships November 15' or other pre-order ship date copy in its sections — the homepage is clean of pre-order messaging

checklist.name: At least 4 FAQ questions
checklist.description: The collapsible-content FAQ section in templates/index.json has at least 4 collapsible_row blocks

checklist.name: Full homepage structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all standard sections: image-banner hero, custom-liquid anchors, multicolumn how-it-works, multicolumn tiers, collage, multicolumn testimonials, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter email capture

checklist.name: Both files valid JSON
checklist.description: Both templates/index.json and templates/product.subscription.json are valid JSON parseable without errors
